description: Full-stack developer (consultant, via Growmate) on a greenfield, high-traffic enterprise platform for the client IRN in Lisbon — building scalable React 18/19 + Next.js front ends and C#/.NET back-end services with secure authentication and production-grade delivery.
highlights: Owned the platform's payment flows end to end — built safeguards to prevent fraud and catch misaligned values, and coordinated across multiple teams to reconcile discrepancies.
Designed and extended a modular, multi-step form-rendering engine in React 18/19 + Next.js to drive complex enterprise workflows.
Integrated Keycloak (OAuth 2.0 / OIDC) authentication wired to Portugal's Chave Móvel Digital (CMD) government identity, plus a payment-provider integration.
Hardened public submissions with mosparo bot protection and validated behaviour under load/stress testing.
Built secure REST APIs with Kafka event streaming and Redis caching across the C#/.NET back end, the React/Next.js front end and the database layer.
Worked in a containerised delivery stack (Docker) as the team migrated toward Kubernetes and Jenkins pipelines; wrote unit/component tests with Jest in an Agile/Scrum workflow.
Mentored interns and junior developers, and used AI tooling (Claude) to accelerate feature delivery.

description: Full-stack developer (consultant, via Neotalent) on VORTAL's enterprise e-tendering platform, as part of Operations Team II — the escalation tier that resolves the real underlying defects and tests incident fixes, rather than the first-line user unblocking handled by Operations I.
highlights: On Operations Team II — the escalation tier that fixes the real underlying defects — resolved 100+ urgent and critical issues spanning authentication, payments, accessibility and UI/UX across C#/ASP.NET services and React UIs, minimising downtime on a high-availability public-procurement platform.
Developed and maintained full-stack features from SQL Server data access through to the React interface.
Built and optimised CI/CD pipelines in Azure DevOps for reliable, repeatable deployments.
Refactored legacy modules to improve performance, maintainability and scalability.
Worked in an Agile team alongside operations, development and infrastructure to resolve complex cross-layer issues.

description: Back-end developer who took sole ownership of a stalled integration project for regulated financial clients — Millennium BCP, ActivoBanco, Ageas Seguros and SIBS — turning it around and delivering secure banking/insurance integrations to production.
highlights: Single-handedly took over a stalled, non-functional project — fixed the outstanding issues, delivered it to production, and built new features for Millennium BCP and Ageas Seguros.
Shipped online pet insurance for Millennium BCP — a product the bank previously didn't offer — now live in the MBCP mobile app.
Designed and shipped REST APIs in C# and Java to integrate partner systems, including a Millennium BCP service bridging to Ageas over SOAP.
Automated detection and processing of financial files (movements, transfers) with Rundeck jobs, persisting to MySQL / SQL Server.
Contributed to a virtual-wallet solution for Medis enabling customers to earn and redeem points/cash for services.
Wrote unit and functional tests (NUnit) and managed delivery with Git, SVN and Azure DevOps CI/CD pipelines.

description: Front-end intern modernising a legacy platform UI into a new Angular design system built on Atomic Design principles.
highlights: Rebuilt UI components in Angular + TypeScript + SCSS following Atomic Design for reuse and visual consistency.
Fixed bugs and improved front-end maintainability and scalability through a structured component architecture.
Collaborated with the development team in a Git + CI/CD workflow to ship UI improvements.

description: Full-stack intern building a back-office application and its mobile-facing APIs, working across C#/ASP.NET Core and the front end.
highlights: Built a back-office application with C#, ASP.NET Core and Entity Framework, including Razor Pages UI.
Developed APIs consumed by a Xamarin mobile client for back-office ↔ mobile communication.
Integrated the Google Maps API (with jQuery) to map parks and trees, persisting to a SQL Server database.
